gitNexus.note: GitNexus CLI is available. Reindex refreshes the local knowledge graph; the dashboard renders the current commit impact graph.

commits.message: (origin/main, origin/HEAD) Add related field support for email templates
(main) Implemented criteria builder for related lists section in layouts
Improve Keystone lookup modal UI
Fix users detail vertical scrolling
Adjust object settings disabled hint placement
Fix inline picklist footer scrolling
Enable standalone documentation entry
Consolidate script wrappers
Keep startup windows open on local restart failures
Allow list view updates without requiring object modify-all access
Handle cleared inline-edit dates without server 500s
Pin field list edit and delete actions to the right edge
Refine admin delete dialogs for destructive and blocked states
Fix layout designer resize alignment
Hide collapsible toggle for record creation layouts
Disable admin assignment add actions when no new assignment exists
Align admin assignment rows and keep add actions inline
Show create layout section help text in record dialogs
Deduplicate relation object validation in admin field modal
Refine layout section help text dialog actions
Stop preselecting principal in new access record modal
Align access record create validation with modal summary card
Allow saving object access-log flags while system logging is off
Fix layout editor save/cancel dirty state reset
Adjusted add section button
